basic_details.job_title: MSETCL Electrician Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 43 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Ltd. (MSETCL/Mahapareshan)
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Limited (MSETCL), also known as Mahapareshan, has released a public notice inviting online applications from ITI Electrician trade-qualified candidates for engagement as Apprentice (Electrician) under the Executive Engineer's Office, Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, Nagpur. The recruitment is for the year 2026-27 and the apprenticeship period is one year.

important_dates.raw: Online Application Start Date: 20.07.2026 Online Application End Date: 27.07.2026, 11:59 PM Last Date to Submit Hard Copy (Form A with documents): 27.07.2026, up to 6:00 PM, at the Executive Engineer's office, Nagpur

age_limit.details: As on 01.07.2026 , the candidate should be not less than 18 years and not more than 38 years of age. A relaxation of 5 years is applicable for candidates belonging to backward category.

qualification.details: Passed Maharashtra State Secondary School Certificate (SSC) examination Passed the Electrician trade examination from an ITI recognized by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT), New Delhi | As on 01.07.2026, the candidate should be not less than 18 years and not more than 38 years of age. A relaxation of 5 years is applicable for candidates belonging to backward category.

salary_details.details: The stipend will be paid as per the prevailing rules applicable to apprentices. The exact stipend amount is not specified in the notification.

selection_process: Selection of apprentice candidates will be done through a merit list prepared on the basis of the average percentage of total marks obtained by combining SSC and ITI examination results
and as per the prevailing social reservation policy.
how_to_apply: Visit the official apprenticeship portal: www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in.
Search for the establishment using the registration number E10162700629 (Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, MSETCL Nagpur).
Register with a currently active email ID and mobile number.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and category details.
Scan and upload all required original certificates as listed above.
Submit the online application between 20.07.2026 and 27.07.2026 (11:59 PM).
Fill the attached Form A (Prapatra A) completely and take a printout along with a copy of the submitted online application.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all required certificates and documents mentioned above.

Send the filled Form A along with the online application copy and documents by post, or deliver in person or through a messenger, to the address below, so as to reach by 27.07.2026, 6:00 PM: Executive Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, 132 KV Upkendra, Mankapur Parisar, Kunal Hospital Samor, Koradi Road, Mankapur, Nagpur – 440030
important_instructions: Applications submitted after the online application period will not be considered. Incomplete applications, or applications with incorrect or defective documents, will not be accepted or considered. If information mentioned in the application is found incorrect or false at any stage, the candidate will be declared ineligible. If a candidate exerts political or other official pressure, or resorts to recommendation or malpractice during the recruitment process, that candidate will be excluded from the process/declared ineligible. Candidates who have previously submitted online applications against this establishment registration number due to a system change must submit the application again. Only applications submitted online between 20.07.2026 and 27.07.2026 will be considered; applications submitted before or after these dates will not be considered. If the required documents/certificates along with Form A are not received within the stipulated time at the Executive Engineer's office, the application will not be considered for the recruitment/selection process. Candidates availing reservation benefits must submit reservation-related documents as per government rules whenever demanded by the office; this is binding on the candidate. Management reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of posts and take all decisions related to the recruitment process; such decisions will not be separately communicated to candidates.

content_sections.heading: MSETCL Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Quick Overview

rows.details: Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission Company Ltd. (MSETCL/Mahapareshan)
Executive Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, Nagpur

content_sections.heading: MSETCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Online Application Start Date: 20.07.2026 Online Application End Date: 27.07.2026, 11:59 PM Last Date to Submit Hard Copy (Form A with documents): 27.07.2026, up to 6:00 PM, at the Executive Engineer's office, Nagpur

content_sections.heading: MSETCL Electrician Apprentice Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The 43 Electrician apprentice posts are spread across sub-divisions and sub-stations under Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, Nagpur.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Passed Maharashtra State Secondary School Certificate (SSC) examination Passed the Electrician trade examination from an ITI recognized by the National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT), New Delhi As on 01.07.2026 , the candidate should be not less than 18 years and not more than 38 years of age. A relaxation of 5 years is applicable for candidates belonging to backward category.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Candidates must scan and upload the following documents on their profile at the time of online application: SSC and ITI Electrician (four semesters) mark sheets School leaving certificate Aadhar card Caste certificate (for candidates belonging to backward category) Maharashtra State domicile certificate Non-creamy layer certificate (for candidates other than SC/ST, if applicable) Economically Weaker Section (EWS) certificate, if applicable Socially and Educationally Backward Class (SEBC) certificate, if applicable Any other necessary supporting documents Important: The name on the SSC and ITI Electrician mark sheets must match the name on the Aadhar card; otherwise the application will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Stipend
content_sections.text: The stipend will be paid as per the prevailing rules applicable to apprentices. The exact stipend amount is not specified in the notification.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection of apprentice candidates will be done through a merit list prepared on the basis of the average percentage of total marks obtained by combining SSC and ITI examination results, and as per the prevailing social reservation policy.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for MSETCL Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official apprenticeship portal: www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in . Search for the establishment using the registration number E10162700629 (Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, MSETCL Nagpur). Register with a currently active email ID and mobile number. Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and category details. Scan and upload all required original certificates as listed above. Submit the online application between 20.07.2026 and 27.07.2026 (11:59 PM) . Fill the attached Form A (Prapatra A) completely and take a printout along with a copy of the submitted online application. Attach self-attested photocopies of all required certificates and documents mentioned above. Send the filled Form A along with the online application copy and documents by post, or deliver in person or through a messenger, to the address below, so as to reach by 27.07.2026, 6:00 PM : Executive Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, 132 KV Upkendra, Mankapur Parisar, Kunal Hospital Samor, Koradi Road, Mankapur, Nagpur – 440030

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications submitted after the online application period will not be considered. Incomplete applications, or applications with incorrect or defective documents, will not be accepted or considered. If information mentioned in the application is found incorrect or false at any stage, the candidate will be declared ineligible. If a candidate exerts political or other official pressure, or resorts to recommendation or malpractice during the recruitment process, that candidate will be excluded from the process/declared ineligible. Candidates who have previously submitted online applications against this establishment registration number due to a system change must submit the application again. Only applications submitted online between 20.07.2026 and 27.07.2026 will be considered; applications submitted before or after these dates will not be considered. If the required documents/certificates along with Form A are not received within the stipulated time at the Executive Engineer's office, the application will not be considered for the recruitment/selection process. Candidates availing reservation benefits must submit reservation-related documents as per government rules whenever demanded by the office; this is binding on the candidate. Management reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of posts and take all decisions related to the recruitment process; such decisions will not be separately communicated to candidates.

rows.details: Executive Engineer, Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, Mahapareshan, 132/33 KV Upkendra, Mankapur Parisar, Kunal Hospital Samor, Chindwada Road, Mankapur, Nagpur – 440030

content_sections.heading: MSETCL Apprentice Important Links
content_sections.text: Apply Online: Click here Official Notification PDF : Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel : Click Here Sarkari Result : Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here Candidates interested in similar opportunities can also explore more ITI Apprentice Jobs and Maharashtra Government Jobs . Those with an Electrician or Electrical trade background can check the latest Electrician Trade Recruitmen t notifications from other PSUs and government departments.

faq.question: Q1. How many Electrician Apprentice posts are available at MSETCL Nagpur in 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 43 Electrician Apprentice posts are available under Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, MSETCL Nagpur.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for MSETCL Electrician Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed SSC and the Electrician trade examination from an NCVT-recognized ITI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for MSETCL Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 27.07.2026 at 11:59 PM. The hard copy of Form A with documents must reach the Executive Engineer's office by 27.07.2026, 6:00 PM.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MSETCL apprentice recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As on 01.07.2026, candidates must be between 18 and 38 years of age, with a 5-year relaxation for backward category candidates.

faq.question: Q5. How is the merit list prepared for MSETCL apprentice selection?
faq.answer: The merit list is prepared based on the average percentage of combined marks obtained in SSC and ITI examinations, as per the prevailing social reservation policy.

faq.question: Q6. Where should the hard copy of the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The hard copy of Form A, along with the online application copy and required documents, must be submitted at the Executive Engineer's office, Auda Sanvasu Vibhag, 132 KV Upkendra, Mankapur Parisar, Koradi Road, Mankapur, Nagpur – 440030.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the MSETCL apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The apprenticeship period is one year, for the year 2026-27.
